allow: Bash(git add config/corne.keymap && git commit -m "fix: comment out led_strip block to fix build")
Bash(git add build.yaml && git commit -m "fix: update board name to nice_nano@v2 for zephyr 3.5+")
Bash(git add build.yaml && git commit -m "fix: update board name to nice_nano@v2.0.0 for zephyr semver requirements" && git push origin main)
Bash(git add build.yaml && git commit -m "fix: update board name to nice_nano@2.0.0 \(remove v\)" && git push origin main)
Bash(git add config/corne.conf && git commit -m "chore: temporarily disable OLED display to debug crashes" && git push origin main)
Bash(git add config/corne.conf && git commit -m "fix: re-enable OLED widgets \(pin, bluetooth\) but keep ext_power off to prevent crash" && git push origin main)
